microsoft_ft: Owned post-deployment success for Azure resilience programs across **enterprise accounts** (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), serving as the day-to-day technical partner driving time-to-value and generating **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that cut operational toil by **30%** and scaled execution without added headcount.

Drove onboarding and production readiness for Azure's first rack-level drill program, delivering in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate by coordinating cross-functional stakeholders and managing end-to-end project timelines.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**, managing executive stakeholders, triaging technical blockers, and aligning engineering teams on resolution timelines.

Built an internal AI agent to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and expanding program capacity by 21% — directly enabling account growth across a larger customer portfolio.
microsoft_2023: Drove **platform adoption** for AI-powered code generation tools by running hands-on demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating time-to-value for each team.

Conducted **11+ structured customer interviews** with Azure engineering stakeholders to surface critical workflow gaps, translating findings into a prioritized product roadmap addition: intent-based YAML generation.

Improved documentation retrieval by migrating to an AI-powered semantic search tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by **83%** and serving as the internal voice of the customer to the engineering team.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional buy-in across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in pull-forward revenue.

Led discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring the playbook-building work of an early-stage customer success org.
Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact fixes, and report clear ROI to stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Managed a **2,000+ unit OS migration** with zero operational downtime by mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, coordinating IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders, and maintaining clear written status updates throughout.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority support tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process — demonstrating the triage and follow-through instincts the role requires.
Drove cross-team alignment to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and freeing engineering capacity to focus on higher-impact product work.
pro_painters: Managed end-to-end project execution for **200+ monthly proposals**, owning scoping, invoicing, and CRM workflows that increased job bookings by 26% and kept multiple concurrent accounts moving without missed follow-ups.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to surface clearer value to prospective customers.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and deliver actionable pricing recommendations to leadership, demonstrating the data fluency and customer-outcome focus the role demands.

tailoring_notes: 'Time-to-value' (JD: 'Drive onboarding and time to value') woven into microsoft_ft bullet 1 and amazon_robotics bullet 1 to mirror JD language directly.
'Voice of the customer' (JD: 'Be the voice of the customer internally') surfaced in microsoft_2023 bullet 3 and pro_painters bullet 3 to show Cyrus has done this structurally, not just ad hoc.
'Triage' and 'resolution with Engineering' (JD: 'Triage and coordinate support') used in amazon_robotics bullet 2 and microsoft_ft bullet 4 to match the support coordination responsibility verbatim.
'Playbook-building' (JD: 'help define the playbooks, templates, and processes') referenced in microsoft_2022 bullet 2 to signal early-org, process-defining experience.

'Account growth' and 'portfolio' (JD: 'Support account growth', 'portfolio of customers') used in microsoft_ft bullets 1 and 5 to frame Azure customer work in CS language the hiring manager will recognize.
